description: Step 4 主参考图主体类型推断配置。按 priority 从小到大匹配，命中关键词即返回 mode。

modes.description: 亲情人物、父母、祖辈、家人和家庭记忆主题
人物关系、爱情、离别、重逢等主题
战争、灾难、群像、行动压力等主题
动物、宠物、机器人、玩偶等非人物主体
植物、花卉、树木、藤蔓等自然生命主体
星系、宇宙、星云、太空等宇宙环境
食物、饮品、菜肴、水果等可食用主体
具体建筑、场所、空间、地标
交通工具、船、车、列车、飞行器
天气、季节、自然现象作为主体
山川湖海、沙漠、森林、田野等地貌景观
古诗、山水、江南、诗性意境
城市、街道、车站、房间、校园等生活空间
职业、手艺、表演、运动和行动主题
旧照片、书信、时钟、乐器等象征物
抽象概念、情绪、命运、时间等象征主题
神话、奇幻、山海经、龙凤、魔法

visual_hint_groups.hint: spring rain, tender new leaves, flowers, wet stone path, soft mist
scorching sunlight, heat shimmer, cicadas, deep shade, bright leaves, sweat, open sky
falling leaves, golden fields, cool wind, distant mountains, dusk light
snow, cold air, bare branches, white silence, warm window light
moonlight, long shadows, quiet water, distant pavilion, night mist
rain threads, wet reflections, ripples, umbrella, mist, softened distance
moving fabric, bending grass, drifting petals, clouds, hair or leaves in motion
riverbank, boat, reflections, bridge, reeds, flowing water
layered mountains, mist, pine trees, cliff path, distant temple
falling petals, blooming branches, delicate foreground flowers, soft fragrance atmosphere
surreal soft light, floating particles, blurred boundary between memory and reality
old doorway, village path, cooking smoke, distant lights, remembered home

mode_hints.family_person: family elder or parent as emotional anchor, warm lived-in home memory, hands, wrinkles, domestic details, tenderness
mode_hints.botanical_subject: clear botanical subject, flower species accuracy, petals, leaves, vines, stem, growth habit, dew, natural habitat
mode_hints.food_subject: clear food or drink subject, ingredients, shape, texture, steam, vessel, table setting, sensory realism
mode_hints.architecture_place: specific place or architecture as anchor, structure, materials, entrance, scale, surrounding spatial context
mode_hints.vehicle_subject: clear vehicle subject, silhouette, material, motion path, travel context, environment supports the vehicle
mode_hints.weather_nature: weather or natural phenomenon as main subject, atmosphere, light, particles, movement, environmental effect
mode_hints.landscape_subject: specific landform or natural place, scale, geography, foreground, distance, weather, coherent terrain
mode_hints.profession_activity: clear human activity or profession, tools, body motion, working context, stakes, cinematic action
mode_hints.abstract_symbolic: symbolic visual metaphor, object and light motifs, spatial emotion, abstract idea made concrete
mode_hints.poetic_imagery: classical Chinese poetic imagery, season, moon, river, mountain, mist, pavilion, boat, empty space
mode_hints.festival_culture: festival objects, ritual details, lanterns, family gathering traces, seasonal cultural atmosphere
mode_hints.urban_life: lived-in street, window light, transit, room details, city weather, everyday objects
mode_hints.object_symbol: symbolic object close detail, texture, light, shadow, surrounding memory space
mode_hints.fantasy_myth: mythic world, enchanted light, legendary creatures, ancient symbols, sacred landscape
mode_hints.cosmic_environment: galaxy, nebula, stars, planets, deep space, vast celestial scale
mode_hints.nonhuman_subject: clear non-human subject, expressive body language, texture, surrounding environment
mode_hints.human_action: human stakes, group movement, conflict traces, aftermath, scale, cinematic tension
mode_hints.relation: two-person relationship, distance and intimacy, gesture, shared space, emotional atmosphere
